default: In {title_lower}, reported gains on the stated benchmark and task setting remain specific to the reported {metric} and {constraint} conditions in {task}
For {title_lower}, the cited number should be read as local to the reported benchmark and task setup, including its {metric} and {constraint} conditions in {task}
Within {title_lower}, this numeric result is tied to the stated evaluation setup in {task}, especially the reported {metric} and {constraint} conditions
performance: In {title_lower}, reported performance gains on the stated benchmark and task setting remain tied to the reported {metric} and {constraint} conditions in {task}
For {title_lower}, the reported improvement stays local to the cited benchmark and task setup, including its {metric} and {constraint} conditions in {task}
Within {title_lower}, this performance gain should be read inside the stated evaluation setup for {task}, not outside its reported {metric} and {constraint} conditions
tradeoff: In {title_lower}, the reported trade-off remains specific to the stated benchmark and task setting plus the {constraint} conditions in {task}
For {title_lower}, that trade-off should be read as local to the reported evaluation setup in {task}, especially its {constraint} conditions
Within {title_lower}, the cited trade-off only holds under the stated benchmark and task setup for {task}, including the reported {constraint} conditions
comparison: In {title_lower}, the reported comparison favors one system under the stated benchmark and task setting, but the numeric margin is not portable without fuller {metric} and {constraint} detail
For {title_lower}, that numeric comparison is tied to the cited benchmark and task setup and does not travel cleanly without fuller {metric} and {constraint} detail
Within {title_lower}, the comparison should be treated as local to the reported evaluation setup because the numeric margin still lacks fuller {metric} and {constraint} detail
